title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences and Technology, Trivandrum, Act, 1980. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st March, 1981, vide notification No. G.S.R. 254(E), dated 17th February, 1981, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i).
